---
## First run: python xlsx_to_yml.py to convert publications.xlsx to publications.yml
## then run quarto render to generate the publications.html file, need pub-listing.ejs and pub-listing.css in the same folder
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and social metrics of papers"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: selected-work
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Selected Work"
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"
css: pub-listing.css
filters: [files/scripts/remove-stray-divfence.lua]  # This filter is used to remove stray ":::" strings that leak into the HTML output when Quarto's listing wrapper fenced divs are interrupted by raw HTML blocks from the EJS template.
---

{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}
{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

<!--
Note: \* corresponding author; ![](/files/images/highly-cited-paper-badge.png "ESI Highly Cited Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Highly cited paper"} ESI Highly Cited Paper (top 1%); ![](/files/images/hot-paper-badge.png "ESI Hot Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Hot paper"} ESI Hot Paper (top 0.1%)

[ESI Highly Cited Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-highly-cited-papers.html) (top 1%)
[ESI Hot Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-hot-papers.html) (top 0.1%)

-->

Total citations as of May 2026:

- [Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/N-4549-2013): 4,500+ (h-index = 30)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ): 7,000+ (h-index = 35, i10-index = 65)

:::{.pub-quicklinks}
[{{< fa user >}} First Author (10)](#category=first-author){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-first .no-external target="_self"}
[\* Corresponding Author (25)](#category=corresponding-author){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-corresponding .no-external target="_self"}
[![ESI Highly Cited Paper](/files/images/highly-cited-paper-badge.png){width=20} Highly Cited (6)](#category=highly-cited){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-highly-cited .no-external target="_self"}
[![ESI Hot Paper](/files/images/hot-paper-badge.png){width=20} Hot Paper (3)](#category=hot-paper){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-hot .no-external target="_self"}
[![Nature Series](/files/images/journal/nature-favicon.png){width=20} Nature Series (10)](#category=nature-series){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-nature .no-external target="_self"}
[{{< fa users >}} All](publications.qmd){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-all .no-external target="_self"}
[Other](other-publications.qmd){.pub-ql-btn .pub-ql-other .no-external target="_self"}
:::

## Selected Work

::: {#selected-work}
:::

## Other Journal Papers

::: {#peer-reviewed}
:::


{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
